title: Source-licensing & provenance policy + register schema (CC-BY-compatibility verdicts, dataVintage)
context: All statistical assertions in Oncology-Data-Literacy courseware must be traceable to a licensed source with its data vintage. The project output is CC-BY-4.0, which means any embedded figure or dataset must be public-domain or CC-BY-compatible. Attractive sources such as some charity statistics or GLOBOCAN derivatives may be NC/ND or restricted, and the rule is redraw from public-domain US-gov data or cite-without-embedding. This task defines the policy and the machine-readable register schema that enforces it, before any source is admitted. No partner is yet secured.
objective: Write the source-licensing and provenance policy document and define the machine-readable register entry schema for all statistical sources used in the courseware. The policy must state the public-domain-first sourcing rule, the NC/ND-incompatible → redraw-or-cite-only rule, and the requirement that a figure or datum may not enter the courseware without a register entry whose ccByCompatible verdict is true or an explicit cite-only marker. The register entry shape must include all fields needed for CI enforcement and staleness checking.
acceptanceCriteria: Defines the register entry schema with all required fields: name, publisher, table/figure id, dataVintage, retrievalDate, url, legalStatus, ccByCompatible (boolean verdict), and reviewBy (staleness date)
States the public-domain-first sourcing rule (prefer US-gov public-domain sources — SEER, CDC, USPSTF, NCI — for embedded figures so CC-BY output is unencumbered)

States the NC/ND-incompatible rule: sources with NC or ND clauses may not be embedded in CC-BY courseware; the options are redraw an equivalent from public-domain data, or mark cite-only (no embedding)
States that a figure or datum may not be used in courseware without a register entry whose ccByCompatible verdict is true or an explicit cite-only marker
Flags GLOBOCAN/IARC as a source whose reuse terms require per-figure verification before embed-or-cite determination
Reviewed and approved by the Maintainer and recorded in the reviewers ledger
output: A source-licensing and provenance policy document and machine-readable register entry schema (JSON or YAML) that defines the CC-BY-compatibility verdict requirement, public-domain-first sourcing rule, NC/ND exclusion rule, and dataVintage+reviewBy staleness fields — the gate that M1 source vetting and the CI citation-coverage check enforce.
